decks.notes: This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, then use Replenish to bring them all back onto the battlefield at once. With Opalescence turning enchantments into creatures, this combo can quickly overwhelm the opponent with a huge board presence. Seal of Cleansing and Decree of Silence offer additional control options, while Mana Leak provides counter magic to protect the combo. The deck utilizes a mix of land acceleration and color fixing to ensure the combo pieces come together smoothly.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize enchantments to generate card advantage, mana ramp, and protection while setting up a powerful win condition. The deck focuses on playing enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards whenever enchantments are cast. It also uses cards like Exploration and Serra's Sanctum to ramp up mana quickly. The win condition is to assemble an Opalescence and Enchantress combo, turning all enchantments into creatures to attack for lethal damage. The deck also includes cards like Sterling Grove for protection and Replenish for recursion.

The deck focuses on using a combination of card draw, counterspells, and stifle effects to quickly assemble and protect the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought with Stifle, creating an almost unbeatable threat on the board. The goal is to disrupt opponents' strategies while efficiently digging through the deck for the combo pieces needed to win the game in a fast and consistent manner.

The deck focuses on aggressively utilizing elf creatures to generate mana and flood the board with threats. By using cards like Priest of Titania and Gaea's Cradle, the deck can quickly ramp up its resources and overwhelm the opponent. Survival of the Fittest helps find key creatures while Wirewood Symbiote provides flexibility and protection. Deranged Hermit and Multani's Acolyte are key threats that can quickly close out games. The deck also includes some disruptive elements like Thornscape Battlemage and Nantuko Vigilante to deal with opposing strategies. Overall, the deck aims to establish a dominant board presence and win the game quickly.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Phantom Nishoba, then using spells like Exhume and Reanimate to bring them back into play cheaply. Cards like Putrid Imp and Unmask help set up the combo, while Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal provide the mana needed to cast spells quickly. City of Brass and Gemstone Mine help fix mana, while Cabal Therapy and Careful Study provide card selection and disruption. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with huge creatures early in the game.

The deck focuses on using counterspells and stifle effects to protect the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle. It aims to quickly find and play the cards needed to assemble the combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and stifle effects. The goal is to control the game while setting up an explosive win condition with the combo, leveraging the stack to protect it and prevent the opponent from stopping it.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful board presence. Using cards like Daze, Foil, and Counterspell to protect the combo, while also utilizing card draw and selection tools like Opt, Impulse, and Portent to find the necessary pieces. Additionally, disruption spells like Misdirection and Thwart are included to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to consistently execute its combo quickly and efficiently to secure victory.

The deck is focused on controlling the opponent's moves through countering spells and card draw. It utilizes a mix of burn spells, counterspells, and card draw to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to stall the game with counterspells and removal until it can establish a card advantage through draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Fact or Fiction. By utilizing a mix of direct damage and creature lands, the deck can close out the game once it has gained control.

The focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bring them back into play through various reanimation spells. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures that are difficult to deal with, such as Symbiotic Wurm, Akroma, Angel of Wrath, and Verdant Force. The deck includes discard spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect the combo pieces. The backbone of the deck lies in its ability to efficiently reanimate threats while controlling the opponent's hand, leading to a quick victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing early aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, along with disruptive spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy to control the opponent's hand and board state. With efficient removal like Snuff Out and Diabolic Edict, along with land destruction from Wasteland, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily chipping away at their life total. Mishra's Factory and Spawning Pool provide additional threats, while Graveborn Muse offers card advantage. Overall, the deck looks to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main concept of this BW Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's hand and graveyard while maintaining control of the board. The deck utilizes cards like Cabal Therapy and Ravenous Rats to strip cards from the opponent's hand, while Animate Dead and Living Death allow the player to reanimate creatures from their or their opponent's graveyard. With a mix of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and a solid mana base with lands like Caves of Koilos and Ancient Tomb, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a grindy matchup.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build a board presence with aggressive Goblin creatures and overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient damage. The deck includes cards that generate additional Goblins, provide buffs to Goblins, and also disrupt the opponent's board with cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent from the early turns and finish off the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to use the combo of Hermit Druid and Phyrexian Dreadnought to quickly put a large creature into play. By discarding the Dreadnought with Hermit Druid's ability, players can then Reanimate it from the graveyard for a big creature on the battlefield. The deck includes cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan, as well as cards like Stifle and Sylvan Safekeeper for protection. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful creature.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantresses and enchantments to create a powerful combo that generates card advantage and mana ramp. By constantly drawing cards and playing enchantments, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence. This is achieved through cards such as Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, Serra's Sanctum, and Mirri's Guile. The deck also includes interaction and protection with cards like Swords to Plowshares, Seal of Cleansing, and Solitary Confinement. Overall, the strategy revolves around exploiting the synergy between enchantresses and enchantments for a dominant board presence.

The deck focuses on creating a lock down on the opponent by using the Stasis enchantment, preventing them from untapping their permanents. It utilizes card draw and countermagic to ensure the opponent cannot break free from the lock while also having win conditions like Black Vise. The deck aims to control the game until it can find a way to win through its combo pieces or overwhelming the opponent's resources.
